title: Emissive Ores – Glow Edition
description: ✨ Brighten up your caves — every ore now glows with its own identity color!
body:
# Emissive Ores: Glow Edition
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Download-brightgreen?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/ccocco)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-Page-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ccocco/projects)
[![License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC--BY--NC--SA--4.0-blue.svg)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)


✨ **Brighten up your caves — every ore now glows with its own identity color!**  
A lightweight, **Continuity-compatible** resource pack that makes ores **emit their distinct glow colors** — no shaders required.  
Fully compatible with **Fabric + Sodium + Continuity** setups.

---

## 💎 Features
- **Emissive Textures** for all overworld, deepslate, and nether ores
- Each ore glows with a unique color:
    - Diamond → Cyan
    - Emerald → Green
    - Redstone → Red
    - Lapis → Blue
    - Gold → Yellow
    - Iron → Silver
    - Copper → Orange
    - Coal → White border & Black
    - Quartz / Ancient Debris → Warm amber tones
- **Outer blocks preserve the natural stone or deepslate texture**,  
  while the **inner core emits each ore’s distinct glow color**, creating a realistic layered appearance.
- Works **without OptiFine**, using **Continuity’s emissive texture support**
- Ultra lightweight (**<1 MB** total)
- **No vanilla assets redistributed** — fully safe to share

---

## 🧩 Compatibility
| Loader | Supported | Note |
|--------|------------|------|
| **Fabric** | ✅ | **Recommended** (with Sodium + Continuity) |
| **Forge** | ⚠️ | Works with OptiFine only |
| **Iris Shaders** | ✅ | Perfectly compatible |
| **Vanilla / Bedrock** | ❌ | Not supported |

**Minecraft Versions Supported:**
> **1.20.1 – 1.21.4**

---

## 📦 Installation
1. Download the version that matches your Minecraft version.
2. Place the `.zip` file into your **resourcepacks** folder.
3. In-game: `Options → Resource Packs` → activate **Emissive Ores: Glow Edition**.
4. Make sure **Continuity** is installed for emissive rendering.

---

## 🪄 Recommended Setup
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Sodium** for performance
- **Continuity** for emissive texture support
- **Complementary** or **BSL Shader (optional)** for enhanced bloom

---
